mapper.select: SELECT qs.id AS quiz_set_id, qs.challenge_date, qs.variant_code, qs.difficulty FROM user_quiz_assignments assignment JOIN quiz_sets qs ON qs.id = assignment.quiz_set_id AND qs.challenge_date = assignment.challenge_date WHERE assignment.challenge_date = #{challengeDate} AND assignment.user_id = #{userId} AND qs.status = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT qa.id AS attempt_id, qa.score, COUNT(aa.question_id) AS total_questions, qa.passage_id, qa.attempt_type, qa.completed_at FROM quiz_attempts qa LEFT JOIN attempt_answers aa ON aa.attempt_id = qa.id WHERE qa.quiz_set_id = #{quizSetId} AND qa.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY qa.id ORDER BY CASE qa.attempt_type WHEN 'PRIMARY' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, qa.completed_at, qa.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_quiz_assignments (user_id, challenge_date, quiz_set_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{challengeDate}, #{quizSetId}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, challenge_date) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT id AS passage_id, position, title, content, topic FROM passages WHERE quiz_set_id = #{quizSetId} ORDER BY position
SELECT q.id AS question_id, q.passage_id, q.position, q.content FROM questions q JOIN passages p ON p.id = q.passage_id WHERE p.quiz_set_id = #{quizSetId} ORDER BY p.position, q.position

SELECT qo.id AS option_id, qo.question_id, qo.position, qo.content FROM question_options qo JOIN questions q ON q.id = qo.question_id JOIN passages p ON p.id = q.passage_id WHERE p.quiz_set_id = #{quizSetId} ORDER BY p.position, q.position, qo.position

SELECT qk.question_id, qk.correct_option_id, qk.explanation, qk.evidence FROM question_keys qk JOIN questions q ON q.id = qk.question_id JOIN passages p ON p.id = q.passage_id WHERE p.quiz_set_id = #{quizSetId} ORDER BY p.position, q.position

SELECT cs.title, cs.publisher, cs.published_on, cs.source_url FROM passage_sources ps JOIN content_sources cs ON cs.id = ps.content_source_id WHERE ps.passage_id = #{passageId} AND cs.verified = TRUE ORDER BY cs.published_on DESC NULLS LAST, cs.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_attempts ( user_id, quiz_set_id, passage_id, attempt_type, score, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{quizSetId}, #{passageId}, #{attemptType}, #{score}, #{completedAt} )

INSERT INTO attempt_answers ( attempt_id, question_id, selected_option_id, is_correct ) VALUES
( #{answer.attemptId}, #{answer.questionId}, #{answer.selectedOptionId}, #{answer.correct} )

INSERT INTO answer_reviews ( user_id, question_id, source_attempt_id ) VALUES
( #{review.userId}, #{review.questionId}, #{review.sourceAttemptId} )
